introduction:
Thank you Ashcroft Homes Ltd., for the opportunity to quote on your Kitchen. At Inspire Design LTD we know building or upgrading a space can feel overwhelming, but it should also be exciting. Our role is to make the process clear and stress-free while delivering quality, care, and professionalism at every stage.

Here are your Specification:

  • Cabinets Doors & Panels - 18mm MDF, Melamine Face, 1mm Laser Edge
  • Cabinet Colour – 18mm White Satin
  • Accent Colour – Bestwood Alberta Larch 
  • Handles – Black D Pull Handle
  • Proprietary integrated soft close hinges and drawer’s runners
  • Worktop - Worktop 20mm Engineered Stone Iceberg White 30mm with undermount sink, tap hole and hob cutout
  • Sink – AN4025/4040 R Modena
  • Tap - Black Gooseneck
  • Integrated pull out bin, 2 x 24L buckets
  • ABS Cutlery Insert; Colour White
  • Delivered and Installed
